content: Project shadcn-style primitive idiom (overstory-6f5a): components in ui/src/components/ui/ use cva (even with no variants — single base string), 'data-slot' attribute on the rendered native element, 'cn(variants(), className)' to merge consumer overrides via twMerge. Export both the component and 'fooVariants' (e.g. inputVariants) so peer elements can reuse the shape (Composer textareas reuse inputVariants() to avoid duplicating the long class string). Focus idiom is 'outline-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px]' (matches button.tsx).

Biome noLabelWithoutControl + custom form components (overstory-6f5a): the biome a11y rule cannot detect a native /, to sibling-style
. Composer.tsx adopted this for Subject/From/Type/Priority. Body/Payload textareas keep wrapper-style because

Project-wide focus-visible idiom: outline-none focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px]. Use focus-visible: not focus:. Use ring-[3px] arbitrary value (Tailwind 4) — codebase does not use the literal ring-3 utility. Established in button.tsx/tabs.tsx/input.tsx, propagated via overstory-4709 to Layout NavItem, TableRow, DialogContent close, ThreadList rows + delete button. For interactive rows clipped by next row's border, append focus-visible:ring-inset.

name: clickable-tablerow-keyboard-a11y
description: Clickable TableRow keyboard a11y: when adding onClick to a TableRow, also add tabIndex={0}, role="button", and onKeyDown that activates on Enter/Space (call e.preventDefault() in the Space branch to suppress page scroll). The TableRow base class in components/ui/table.tsx already provides focus-visible ring, so no extra className needed at the call site. See ui/src/routes/fleet/AgentTable.tsx for the canonical example (overstory-4709).

name: empty-loading-frame-parity
description: EmptyState/LoadingCard primitives mirror card.tsx frame (border + ring-1 ring-foreground/10 + rounded-xl) so empty and loading branches read as elevated UI. LoadingCard uses motion-safe:animate-pulse so prefers-reduced-motion users don't see pulsing. Render <output> (implicit role=status) instead of div + role=status to satisfy biome useSemanticElements.

content: Project focus-visible idiom (overstory-4709 audit confirms): outline-none focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px]. Use the arbitrary value ring-[3px] (Tailwind 4 syntax), not the ring-3 utility — that utility is not in the project's Tailwind scale. Pattern matches existing button.tsx, input.tsx, select.tsx, badge.tsx, tabs.tsx. For interactive list rows where the focus ring would be clipped at the bottom border, append focus-visible:ring-inset to keep the ring visible inside the row.

name: navlink-aria-current-data-attribute-styling
description: react-router-dom NavLink automatically sets aria-current="page" on the active route. To match the shadcn data-attribute styling idiom (mx-f7df70) without conditional className callbacks, use Tailwind 4's aria-[current=page]: variant selectors directly in a static className string. Example: className="text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent/50 aria-[current=page]:bg-accent aria-[current=page]:font-medium". Eliminates the cn()+isActive callback for nav items.
